cache_entries_stale_after_fresh_check.name: cache_entries_stale_after_fresh_check
cache_entries_stale_after_fresh_check.value: "cache_entries"."stale_until" IS NULL OR "cache_entries"."fresh_until" IS NULL OR "cache_entries"."stale_until" >= "cache_entries"."fresh_until"

cache_entries_ready_requires_content_che.name: cache_entries_ready_requires_content_check
cache_entries_ready_requires_content_che.value:
"cache_entries"."status" != 'ready' OR (
      "cache_entries"."storage_key" IS NOT NULL AND
      "cache_entries"."content_hash" IS NOT NULL AND
      "cache_entries"."rendered_at" IS NOT NULL AND
      "cache_entries"."fresh_until" IS NOT NULL AND
      "cache_entries"."stale_until" IS NOT NULL
    )

cache_entries_pending_no_content_check.name: cache_entries_pending_no_content_check
cache_entries_pending_no_content_check.value: "cache_entries"."status" != 'pending' OR ("cache_entries"."storage_key" IS NULL AND "cache_entries"."content_hash" IS NULL)
